rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.222, which addresses school districts providing safe firearm storage information. The two provisions govern entirely distinct subject matters.
quote: The center, in collaboration with the Department of Public Safety, shall provide to each school district and open-enrollment charter school information and other resources regarding the safe storage of firearms
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and safe firearm storage statute.
